content.text: I'll create all 10 infrastructure files for the CitedBy.ai Public project. First, let me create the directory, then write all files in parallel.
Now I'll write all 10 files in parallel.

input.content:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "lib": ["ES2021", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": false,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "strict": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "baseUrl": ".",
    "paths": {
      "./*": ["./*"]
    }
  },
  "include": [
    "App.tsx",
    "index.tsx",
    "types.ts",
    "pages/**/*",
    "services/**/*",
    "components/**/*",
    "i18n/**/*",
    "lib/**/*",
    "types/**/*",
    "vite.config.ts"
  ],
  "exclude": ["dist", "node_modules"]
}

# CitedBy.ai Public
VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://YOUR_PROJECT.supabase.co
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=YOUR_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
VITE_APP_URL=http://localhost:5174

# Gemini AI
GEMINI_API_KEY=YOUR_GEMINI_API_KEY

# Stripe
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_live_or_test_xxx
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=whsec_xxx
STRIPE_PRICE_CREDITS_20=price_xxx_credits20
STRIPE_PRICE_CREDITS_50=price_xxx_credits50
STRIPE_PRICE_CREDITS_120=price_xxx_credits120

content.text:
All 10 infrastructure files have been successfully created at `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\`. Here is a summary of what was written:

| # | File | Purpose |
|---|------|---------|
| 1 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\package.json` | Project manifest with Vite, React 18, Supabase, Stripe, Recharts, Zod, Tailwind, and TypeScript dependencies |
| 2 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\vite.config.ts` | Vite config with React plugin, dev server on port 5174, ES2020 build target |
| 3 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\tsconfig.json` | TypeScript strict mode config with bundler module resolution, react-jsx, and path aliases |
| 4 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\postcss.config.cjs` | PostCSS config loading Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins |
| 5 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\tailwind.config.ts` | Tailwind config with gold/noir design system -- custom gold color palette, Inter + Playfair Display fonts, and gold shimmer/pulse/reflection animations |
| 6 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\index.html` | HTML entry point with French lang, Google Fonts preconnect, scroll progress bar, dark body background |
| 7 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\index.tsx` | React 18 entry point rendering `<App />` inside `StrictMode` |
| 8 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\globals.css` | Global styles with Tailwind directives, `.btn-gradient`, `.gradient-text`, `.ninja-card`, `.gold-reflection`, custom scrollbar styling, skeleton shimmer, scroll progress bar, and slide/fade animations |
| 9 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\.env.example` | Environment variable template for Supabase, Gemini AI, and Stripe credentials |
| 10 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\.gitignore` | Git ignore rules for node_modules, dist, .env files, IDE configs, and .claude/ |

The project is ready for the next step -- creating the `App.tsx` component and installing dependencies with `npm install`.
